summary: Spain advance to World Cup QF after beating Iberian rivals Portugal, Sánchez arrives at NATO summit ready to stand up to Trump, and more news from Spain on Tuesday 7th July.

title: Spain advance to World Cup QF by ending rival Ronaldo's World Cup career
summary: Substitute Mikel Merino scored a dramatic late winner to put Spain in the quarter-finals with a 1-0 victory over Portugal and end Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup career on Monday.

title: What is Madrid’s new 'unborn baby' law and could it become national policy?
summary: Spain's opposition leader just announced that he would implement Madrid’s new 'unborn baby' law if he becomes Prime Minister. But what is it?

title: Spain to limit passenger numbers at Madrid and Barcelona airports in 2027
summary: Amid new border rules and record tourism levels, Spain's state operator is planning to limit air passengers at peak times in order to ensure long-term capacity and infrastructure demands.

title: MAP: How to find out where Spain's active wildfires are
summary: Spain experiences wildfires over summer, threatening homes and causing devastation across thousands of hectares. Here's how to use Google to find out where active blazes are occurring.
